textByHash.3d16208a9179e14dd546f0237ee19f70e4ec1236: You tell me. It's your mind we're in right now.
textByHash.3fb73726515f039f598990c611a94df81f04a892: Good job this is a shared dream then. It doesn't have to be you that defeats him.
textByHash.59612067f7c17693214daed2c5226ecdcd30df10: Going through the barrier will give you access to Robert's memories, but only while you're in the dream. As soon as you leave, you'll forget them again.
textByHash.8991b385d52a2c7844a8ce7f8dc459f4dafb36d0: Pass through the barrier and defeat the guardian. That should restore Bob's lost memories.
textByHash.d741d0b6e13e1f31e860450834bbaa344313a19d: I just told you, I'm Not Bob.
textByHash.da2ab9973b1f45065edc31ddf870d57a335c9da0: I suppose I can. This barrier represents the divide between Bob the Cat and Robert the Strong. The memories you seek are right here, on the other side of the barrier.
textByHash.f2bf8098b7ed54b25f8d287a8868a2ccfa3154db: Destroying the barrier of course. Head through the barrier and defeat the guardian. That should do the trick.
textByHash.fa3b83f2c808900bafa5857664ba8fdcc22adff9: Well one thing's for sure, I'm definitely Not Bob.
